sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 15.10 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.15)

statement.latex: (Yu.\,I.\,Merzlyakov). Is the group of all automorphisms of the free group$F_n$that act trivially on$F_n/[F_n,F_n]$linear for$n 3$? { V.\,G.\,Bardakov} No, it is not: for$n 5$(A.\,Pettet, Cohomology of some subgroups of the automorphism group of a free group, Ph.D. Thesis, 2006), and for$n 3$(V.\,G.\,Bardakov, R.\,Mikhailov, Commun. Algebra, 36, no.\,4 (2008), 1489--1499).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
